zh:
克苏鲁神话从来不是一部写定的神谱。H·P·洛夫克拉夫特在小说、合作稿与书信中反复放出一些彼此照应的名字：阿卡姆、米斯卡托尼克大学、《死灵之书》、旧日支配者，以及一个对人类毫无义务的深空。它们没有统一教义，甚至经常互相矛盾。洛夫克拉夫特本人更常把这套松散的共享设定戏称为“犹格-索托斯体系”；“克苏鲁神话”这一总名主要由奥古斯特·德雷斯在他死后推广。德雷斯又把诸神整理成元素阵营和善恶战争，那是后来的解释，并非洛夫克拉夫特原作的宇宙秩序。

本卷以洛夫克拉夫特已进入美国公版的核心文本为第一层，把每一个名字放回它首次真正现身的故事；再单列比尔斯、钱伯斯等前驱留下的旧名，以及德雷斯与后继作者改变它们的方式。哈斯塔就是最清楚的例子：在比尔斯笔下是牧羊神，在钱伯斯那里与黄衣之王和卡尔克萨相连，在洛夫克拉夫特作品中只是被一串禁忌名称掠过，后来才被塑成克苏鲁的对立神。所谓“完整”，因此不是抹平版本，而是让每一层作者、年代与改写都留下边界。

这套现代神话也携带作者时代的阴影。洛夫克拉夫特的种族主义、排外恐惧与阶级焦虑不是宇宙恐怖之外的偶然污点，而参与塑造了他笔下对混血、移民、衰败城市和未知血统的惊惧。本卷会在相关条目中指出这种来源，同时记录后来作家如何从不同族裔、性别与地域重新夺取这片宇宙。夜色可以保留，偏见不能被伪装成亘古真理。
en:
The Cthulhu Mythos was never a finished pantheon. Across stories, collaborations, and letters, H. P. Lovecraft repeatedly released a cluster of answering names—Arkham, Miskatonic University, the Necronomicon, ancient powers, and a deep cosmos that owes humanity nothing. They do not form a doctrine and often contradict one another. Lovecraft jokingly called the loose shared apparatus “Yog-Sothothery”; the umbrella term “Cthulhu Mythos” was chiefly popularized after his death by August Derleth. Derleth then arranged the beings into elemental factions and a moral war, an influential later interpretation rather than the order of Lovecraft's fiction.

This volume begins with the Lovecraft core now available in public-domain United States editions, returning each name to the story in which it actually appears. It separately marks predecessors such as Ambrose Bierce and Robert W. Chambers, and the changes made by Derleth and later writers. Hastur shows why the layers matter: a shepherd god in Bierce, entangled with the King in Yellow and Carcosa in Chambers, a passing forbidden name in Lovecraft, and only later fashioned into Cthulhu's elemental rival. Completeness here means preserving authors, dates, and incompatible versions rather than flattening them into false scripture.

The mythology also carries the shadow of its maker's time. Lovecraft's racism, xenophobia, and class fear are not incidental marks outside the cosmic horror; they helped shape his dread of mixture, immigration, decaying cities, and unknown ancestry. The relevant leaves name that source while also recording how later writers of other races, genders, and regions have taken the cosmos back and made it answer different questions. The night may remain. Prejudice will not be disguised as an eternal truth.
